a.xlink:title: A record for tracking the position of Characters, Items, and Tiles if needed.

Moves the character to a new position.
Initializes a new instance of the Player class.
Removes and returns the top item at a given position.
Returns the total number of items at a given position.
Drops the weapon onto the current level at the player's position.
